'''Z'trop''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Tamarin sector/Legends|Tamarin sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==Description==
Z'trop was a [[Temperature/Legends|tropical]] world with numerous [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] islands. The wide [[Beach/Legends|beaches]] and clear [[Water/Legends|waters]] of these islands made it a popular destination for romantic holidays. [[Trileaf tree]]s grew on volcanic bluffs on the planet, and seaweed grew in the [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]], fed upon by the [[Vegetarian/Legends|vegetarian]] [[septapus]]—seven tentacled creatures with five glowing [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]—which swam the oceans.<ref name="MfMY" />

==History==
[[Firmus Kett]]'s family had a [[Kett family retreat|retreat]] on Z'trop.<ref name="EGW-cut6" />

Following the kidnapping of [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] by [[Trioculus]] in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] flew the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] to the planet for a vacation. Accompanying them were Leia Organa, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Ken]] Palpatine and their droids. However, their vacation was cut short when they discovered an unmanned Imperial [[Compact Assault Vehicle/Wheeled PX-10|Compact Assault Vehicle]] on a bluff overlooking their location. On investigation of some items inside, they realized it was affiliated with [[Scardia Station]] and the [[Prophets of the Dark Side]]. Fearing discovery, they promptly left the planet to return to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] base on [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]].<ref name="MfMY" />
